title: geranium inodorum
intro: Geranium inodorum, also known as the sweet-scented geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties, which are attributed to the presence of geraniol and linalool compounds. The health benefits of Geranium inodorum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote better sleep. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be applied topically or ingested under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
